title: Succession Judge
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Succession Judge''' was a role in traditional challenge by personal combat in [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]]. The challenge included two individual fighters attacking each other with [[dematoil]]s. The Succession Judge was to be a neutral observer. Each fighter was allowed to have a [[Defender (role)|Defender]], traditionally used to avoid uninvited interruptions of the battle, but more commonly used to verify that the battle was kept honorably.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Sources==
